name: Creamy Chicken Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a food processor until well mixed and pasty.
2. Separate the crescent rolls and roll them out thinly on a baking sheet.
3. Place 2 tablespoons of the mixture in the center of each roll.
4. Roll up each crescent roll tightly, starting from one end.
5. Brush with melted butter.
6. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes. These can be served as an appetizer or used for finger food during dinner.
